SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery

Class Entrant

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.Entrant
public class Entrant extends Object
Model for an entrant (user) profile. Stored in Firestore at users/{deviceId}. Separate from organizer accounts; one device may have both an Entrant and an Organizer profile.
